title: Svetasvatara Upanishad I: Who Is the Cause?
description: From the Svetasvatara Upanishad I — one of the foundational texts of Indian philosophy.
introduction: From the Svetasvatara Upanishad I — one of the foundational texts of Indian philosophy.

translation.text: Wise men, discoursing on Brahman, ask: What is the cause? Whence have we been born? By what do we live? On what are we established? O Brahman-knowers, who is it that orders us forth in pleasures and pains?
